label: Specialiserad bygg- och anläggningsverksamhet
description: Scaffold för specialiserade bygg- och anläggningsföretag inom SNI 43, med fokus på tjänster, referensjobb, behörigheter och offertförfrågningar.
primaryJobs: bygga fortroende med behorigheter och garantier

routes.purpose: Positionera bygg- eller hantverksforetaget, visa huvudinriktning och leda besokaren till offert eller kontakt.
Beskriva de specialiserade tjansterna konkret sa att kunden forstar vad foretaget utfor.
Visa utvalda projekt, fore- och efterbilder samt vilken typ av arbete som har utforts.
Gora det enkelt att begara offert eller ta kontakt via telefon, e-post och kontaktformular.

routes.when: nar foretaget vill lyfta erfarenhet, arbetsatt, team eller yrkesbakgrund
nar foretaget arbetar i flera orter och vill tydliggora verksamhetsomraden for lokala besokare
nar kunder ofta undrar om process, materialval, tidsplan, garantier eller ansvar

sectionOrderRules: Hero must include company type or trade focus, service area if known, and a primary CTA to request a quote.
Service summary must mention actual work categories relevant to the business, not vague promises.
Trust proof should highlight real qualifications, industry rules, guarantees or work methods only when supported by the business data.
Gallery or testimonials may appear before trust-proof when project material exists.
Final contact-cta must appear near the bottom and should not repeat the exact same copy as the hero.
Services intro must explain what kinds of specialized construction or installation work the company performs.
Service list items must be concrete, for example renovation, tiling, painting, groundworks, electrical or plumbing work when applicable.
If pricing-overview is shown, it must describe pricing structure honestly and avoid fixed promises unless supplied by the business.
A contact CTA should follow the service details to capture quote intent.
Portfolio intro must explain that the page shows examples of completed or ongoing work.
Project gallery should prioritize authentic project photos, especially before-and-after material when available.
Project highlights must describe the type of job, scope or outcome without inventing customer names or project facts.
Contact CTA should invite similar project inquiries after the showcased work.
Contact info must include real phone, email and address details when available.
Contact-form-section should be oriented around quote requests and allow the visitor to describe the job.
Map may be shown when the business has a physical address or office worth displaying.
Opening hours should only be shown when the business has defined contact or office hours.

mustPass: Has a home route with path /.
Includes routes that match this industry's need to present services and reference jobs.
Every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
Paths are Swedish, lowercase and without trailing slash.
Recommended dossiers only use allowed ids.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic local-service structure without a project or references page.
Vague service descriptions that do not explain what work is performed.
Invented certifications, guarantees, customer counts or years of experience.
Duplicating the same trust claim in multiple sections without adding new information.

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Specialiserad bygg- och anlaggningsverksamhet inom SNI 43 behover en scaffold som lyfter konkreta tjanster, referensjobb, fore- och efterbilder, behorigheter, garantier och tydlig offertkontakt. Viktiga sidor ar startsida, tjanster, referenser och kontakt, med mojlighet att lagga till om oss, verksamhetsomraden och vanliga fragor.
llmClassificationHints: Choose this scaffold for tradespeople and specialized construction firms that perform practical on-site jobs.
Strong fit when the business needs both services and project references.
Trust content should center on real qualifications, industry rules, guarantees and workmanship rather than brand storytelling alone.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
